bundle_title: AP Writing Grading Modules (Full Spec for Lovable)

modules.purpose: Student highlights where each document is used; app counts unique docs and flags missing docs.
ui: Split screen: documents on left, essay on right
Highlight tool assigns doc_id tags to essay spans

modules.purpose: Prompts sourcing (HIPP) for at least 3 documents with templates and examples.

templates.H: Historical situation: 'At the time, ___ was happening, which helps explain ___.'
templates.I: Intended audience: 'Because the author addressed ___, the message emphasizes ___.'
templates.P: Purpose: 'The author aims to ___, so the document highlights ___.'
templates.Pov: Point of view: 'From the perspective of ___, the author likely ___.'

modules.purpose: Checklist-based capture of outside evidence and specificity checks.
checklist: Names a specific event, policy, law, person, or movement
Correctly placed in time and place

logic_hints: Thesis: must answer prompt with defensible claim
Docs: 6+ docs for full evidence_documents credit
HIPP: 3+ sourcing analyses for analysis_reasoning point

modules.purpose: Student selects thesis; app checks defensibility and prompt alignment.
Highlights evidence and flags quote-dumps / missing commentary.
heuristics: Evidence markers: quotation marks, paraphrase verbs, source tags (Synthesis)

modules.purpose: Checks whether each paragraph ties back to thesis and progresses logically.
ui: Paragraph list with a 'main point' field

modules.purpose: Guides student to add complexity/nuance for sophistication point.
checklist: Uses a complex line of reasoning
